attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.OA_MAPPING_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.ATTR_SKU_NAME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.ATTR_SKU_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.ATTR_SKU_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.PARENT_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.LP_SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.MAPPING_START_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.MAPPING_END_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.DISABLE_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.EXCEPTION_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS,
(
 select OA_MAPPING_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS
 minus
 select OA_MAPPING_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAPPING_ATTRS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.OA_MAPPING_ID = STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.OA_MAPPING_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAP_ATTRS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXITM_EGE_OA_MAPPING_ATTRS)
